executive_summary: Tesla is transitioning from pure EV manufacturer to AI + energy platform. FSD v13 robotaxi pilots in Austin and Bay Area are the valuation hinge — success unlocks $500B+ mobility TAM; delay compresses multiple back to auto OEM peers. Energy storage growing 60%+ YoY, now material to gross profit.

sections.title: Auto Business
sections.body: Q1 2026 deliveries: 422K vehicles (-9% YoY). Model Y refresh driving mixed demand. China BYD price war forcing margin compression in APAC. Cybertruck production ramping but contribution still <5% of volume. ASP declining $3,200 YoY — volume-over-margin strategy intact.

sections.title: FSD & Robotaxi
sections.body: Unsupervised FSD licensed in TX and CA (limited geofence). 2.1M vehicles on FSD subscription ($99/mo) or $12K buy. Robotaxi network pilot: 340 vehicles, 18K rides/week in Austin. Regulatory path in EU 18+ months behind US. Waymo still leads measured autonomous miles but Tesla scales faster on fleet size.

sections.title: Energy & AI Compute
sections.body: Megapack backlog $28B+. 40 GWh deployed in 2025. Dojo successor chips powering internal training; external AI compute sales rumored for H2 2026. xAI partnership potential — Musk entity overlap creates governance questions for institutional holders.

sections.title: Agent-Sourced Lead Opportunities
sections.body: Commercial fleet electrification: 890 SMB fleets in TX/CA/AZ with 10+ vehicle counts and no charging infra vendor locked. Solar + storage installers without Tesla Certified status: 120 high-intent prospects. Recommended play: bundled FSD fleet pricing for 20+ vehicle operators.

recommendation: SPECULATIVE BUY on robotaxi milestone confirmation. Trim if Q2 deliveries miss 450K or FSD incident rate spikes above 0.8 per million miles.
